title: Naked
questions: Have you ever been to a nudist beach? What was it like? (If you have never been to a nudist beach, would you like to? Why/not?)
Why do you think nudity is acceptable to some people/cultures but not to others?
How acceptable is nudity in your country? In what situations is it acceptable (films, art, the news, documentaries etc)?
Why is nudity often considered shocking?
At what age do you think children should be allowed to see nude adults in the media (in films, in documentaries, in paintings, etc.)?
Do you think there is too much nudity in your country or too little?
Do you think people who go naked in public should be arrested? Why/not?
Do you think advertising posters in public places should be allowed to show naked people, topless women, etc? Why/not?
Have you ever accidentally walked in on someone in the nude (or vice versa)? What happened? What did you say?
